entry.title: (数学)A. Restoring Three Numbers
entry.content: 这个是一个数学题。不过不必是暴力的。 题目链接：http://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1154/A A. Restoring Three NumbersPolycarp has guessed three positive integers aa, bb and cc. He keeps these numbers in secret, but he writes down four numbers on a board in arbitrary order — their pairwise sums (three numbers) and sum of all three numbers (one number). So, there are four numbers on a board in random order: a+ba, a+c, b+c and a+b+c. You have to guess three numbers aa, bb and cc using given numbers. Print three guessed integers in any order. Pay attention that some given numbers a, b and c can be equal (it is also possible that a=b=c). Input The only line of the input contains four positive integers x1,x2,x3,x4(2≤xi≤10^9) — numbers written on a board in random order. It is guaranteed that the answer exists for the given number x1,x2,x3,x4. Output Print such positive integers aa, bb and cc that four numbers written on a board are values a+b, a+c, b+c and a+b+c written in some order. Print a, b and c in any order. If there are several answers, you can print any. It is guaranteed that the answer exists. Examples input Copy 13 6 5 4 output Copy 12 1 3 input Copy 140 40 40 60 output Copy 120 20 20 input Copy 1201 101 101 200 output Copy 11 100 100 这个是一个数学题，不必是从1开始暴力，会超时的。可以从给出的4个数中选出最大的（a+b+c当然是最大的），然后减去其他中的一个，得到a或b或c，最后把剩下的两个减去这个数，得到相应的数。 Python代码: 12345678Q = map(int, input().split()) # 最后得到的就是一个tuple类型L = list(Q) # 将tuple类型转换为list类型。L.sort() # 排序，为了得到a + b + c的值。m = L[3]c = m - L[2]a = L[0] - cb = L[1] - cprint(a, b, c)

entry.title: (brute force, implementation)A. Fafa and his Company
entry.content: 这是一个很水的题，但是自己的英语基础很差，理解文章却花了我不少时间。。。 题目链接：935A - Fafa and his Company A. Fafa and his CompanyFafa owns a company that works on huge projects. There are n employees in Fafa’s company. Whenever the company has a new project to start working on, Fafa has to divide the tasks of this project among all the employees. Fafa finds doing this every time is very tiring for him. So, he decided to choose the best l employees in his company as team leaders. Whenever there is a new project, Fafa will divide the tasks among only the team leaders and each team leader will be responsible of some positive number of employees to give them the tasks. To make this process fair for the team leaders, each one of them should be responsible for the same number of employees. Moreover, every employee, who is not a team leader, has to be under the responsibility of exactly one team leader, and no team leader is responsible for another team leader. Given the number of employees n, find in how many ways Fafa could choose the number of team leaders l in such a way that it is possible to divide employees between them evenly. Input The input consists of a single line containing a positive integer n (2 ≤ n ≤ 105) — the number of employees in Fafa’s company. Output Print a single integer representing the answer to the problem. Examples input Copy 12 output Copy 11 input Copy 110 output Copy 13 Note In the second sample Fafa has 3 ways: choose only 1 employee as a team leader with 9 employees under his responsibility. choose 2 employees as team leaders with 4 employees under the responsibility of each of them. choose 5 employees as team leaders with 1 employee under the responsibility of each of them. 这个是一个基础的题，注意题目中的“find in how many ways”，可以看出，这个是求分配的方案的总数，这个分配必须保证每个领导带领的人是一样的。因此可以采取模拟。 Python代码： 12345678n = int(input())sum = 0i = 1while i <= n // 2: if (n - i) % i == 0: sum += 1 i += 1print(sum) C++代码： 12345678910111213141516#include<iostream>using namespace std;int main() { int n; cin >> n; int sum = 0; int i = 1; while (i <= n / 2) { if ((n - i) % i == 0) { sum++; } i++; } cout << sum << endl; return 0;} PS:英语很重要，很重要的

entry.title: 利用torch.optim.SGD类实例最小化函数f(x)
pytorch的view()的用法的总结
entry.content: 如题 下面看代码（解释见注释）1234567891011121314151617181920212223import torchimport numpy as npa = np.array([[[1,2,3], [4,5,6]]])print("numpy 的 reshape")print(a.reshape(-1,6))print("=============")print("pytorch")x = torch.tensor(a)print(x.size())print(x)x = x.view(-1,6)print(x.size())print(x)print("-------------")b = np.array([1,2,3])y = torch.tensor(b)print(y.size())print(y)y = y.view(-1,3)print(y.size())print(y) 输出：1234567891011121314numpy 的 reshape[[1 2 3 4 5 6]]=============pytorchtorch.Size([1, 2, 3])tensor([[[1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6]]], dtype=torch.int32)torch.Size([1, 6])tensor([[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]], dtype=torch.int32)-------------torch.Size([3])tensor([1, 2, 3], dtype=torch.int32)torch.Size([1, 3])tensor([[1, 2, 3]], dtype=torch.int32) 从上面可以看出，此处的view()的作用和numpy的reshape的作用类似，就是转换维度，最后得到自己需要的维度的张量，其中-1则是具有推导合适的值得作用，和numpy里面一样。

entry.title: pytorch、numpy和list的求平方
entry.content: 如题 输入例子：1234567891011import numpy as npimport torcha = [1/2, 1/4] # 一个listb = np.array(a)# 转换成数组print(np.power(a, 2)) # 求平方。print(b ** 2) # 数组可以用 ** ,但是列表是不能用的。print(a + a) # 等同于 print(a * 2)# 利用pytorch求平方。x = torch.tensor(a)print((x ** 2).numpy()) 输出结果：1234[0.25 0.0625][0.25 0.0625][0.5, 0.25, 0.5, 0.25][0.25 0.0625]

entry.title: BrokenPipeError [Errno 32] Broken pipe 的解决办法
entry.content: PyTorch : Training A Classifier 中的BrokenPipeError: [Errno 32] Broken pipe问题的解决办法 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738import torchimport torchvisionimport torchvision.transforms as transformsimport matplotlib.pyplot as pltimport numpy as npdef imshow(img): img = img / 2 + 0.5 # unnormalize npimg = img.numpy() plt.imshow(np.transpose(npimg, (1, 2, 0))) plt.show()transform = transforms.Compose( [transforms.ToTensor(), transforms.Normalize((0.5, 0.5, 0.5), (0.5, 0.5, 0.5))])trainset = torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10(root='./data', train=True, download=True, transform=transform)trainloader = torch.utils.data.DataLoader(trainset, batch_size=4, shuffle=True, num_workers=2)testset = torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10(root='./data', train=False, download=True, transform=transform)testloader = torch.utils.data.DataLoader(testset, batch_size=4, shuffle=False, num_workers=2)classes = ('plane', 'car', 'bird', 'cat', 'deer', 'dog', 'frog', 'horse', 'ship', 'truck')# get some random training imagesdataiter = iter(trainloader)images, labels = dataiter.next()# show imagesimshow(torchvision.utils.make_grid(images))# print labelsprint(' '.join('%5s' % classes[labels[j]] for j in range(4))) 但是出了问题： 1BrokenPipeError: [Errno 32] Broken pipe 这个问题与windows下多线程的问题有关， 与torch.utils.data.DataLoader()的num_workers参数有关，目前，到版本1.1.0为止，PyTorch的官方教程仍未改变或提出关于这个的解法。 我们只需要把这个num_workers把2改为0，只启用一个主进程加载数据集。

entry.title: pytorch的size()的总结
entry.content: 如题 pytorch的size()的总结：输入的代码的例子1：12345678910111213141516import torchimport numpy as npa = np.array([[1,2,3], [4,5,6]])x = torch.tensor(a)print("numpy:")print("Shape of a:",a.shape)print("Type of a.shape:", type(a.shape))print("Size of a:", a.size)print("-------------")print("pytorch:")print("Shape of x:",x.shape)print("Size of x:",x.size())print("Type of x.size():",type(x.size())) 输出结果:123456789numpy:Shape of a: (2, 3)Type of a.shape: <class 'tuple'>Size of a: 6-------------pytorch:Shape of x: torch.Size([2, 3])Size of x: torch.Size([2, 3])Type of x.size(): <class 'torch.Size'> ​ 在关于pytorch的size()中，我们通过和numpy类比，可以发现，pytorch的size()的功能和numpy的shape属性类似，而和numpy的size属性是不一样的，另外，pytorch的size()功能和属性shape一样。 ​ 还有，pytorch的torch.size()是一个元组，可以实现python中的元组的一系列操作。 123456789import torchimport numpy as npa = np.array([[1,2,3], [4,5,6]])x = torch.tensor(a)print(x.size()[1:]) 输出：1torch.Size([3]) # 切片
